title: DnsIpResolutionRangeResponse
description: DnsIpResolutionRangeResponse schema from Censys Platform API

ip.description: The IP address that was queried.

next_page_token.description: A token that can be used to retrieve the next page of records.

records.description: The list of domain names that resolved to this IP.

total_records.description: The number of records that exist in total across all pages.
